feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CDS View for Check Clearing Date
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts.

I have created a customized payment report in Custom CDS Views in sap public cloud. And i my report i need "Check Clearing Date".

In which CDS View can i get the "Check Clearing Date" field in SAP Public Cloud?

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: CDS View for Check Clearing Date
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts.

I have created a customized payment report in Custom CDS Views in sap public cloud. And i my report i need "Check Clearing Date".

In which CDS View can i get the "Check Clearing Date" field in SAP Public Cloud?

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: BAdI that work custom field logic only click 'Save' button in Purchase Order
entry.content: I write custom field logic in MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM. It trigger everytime I click something in Purchase Order. I would like to control that BAdI logic to trigger when only click Save button in Purchase Order. Is it possible or is there any other BAdI of purchase order to fulfill this request?

entry.title: SAP Fiori UI Adaptation: Hide 'Standard' View
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using UI Adaptation to hide certain fields in a standard Fiori app. What we would like to do is hide a few fields in a smart table object. As seen in the screenshot below, we have created a 'Custom' view for the Roles table by hiding certain fields. But when the app loads with this new UI variant, the user is still able to select the 'Standard' view for the Roles table and see All the fields, even those that were hidden in the Custom view. How do we prevent the user from selecting the Standard view such that only the Custom view is selectable/displayed?

I'm pretty sure this must be a common requirement - hiding fields in tables/line items?

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: In Fiori MyInbox, where can we see the 'Deadline Messages' similar to Business Workplace
entry.content:
Hello All,
How can we see the 'deadline messages' in Fiori MyInbox application (App ID F0862).

Currently I am able to see the following filters in the fiori app:

 

Filter By

 - Priority
 - Due On
 - Status
 - Created On
 - My Tasks and Tasks on Behalf Of
 - Task Type

 

Is it possible to add a new Filter,maybe via Flexible workflows?
Do I need to enhance the standard app in BAS to add a new Filter?
Do we also need to enhance its corresponding backend class?

entry.title: The Sales Order Confirmation PDF Output lack the customer name field
entry.content:
Hi,

In APP Maintain Form Templates , I copy the Form Template SD_SLS_ORDER_CONFIRM, and create a new Form Template.

 

But I find that the customer name field is not in the data source 'FDP_V1_ORDER_CONFIRM_SRV'

I download the so XML ,and open it by LC Designer. I can find the customer field , but I can't find the customer name field.

 

How to get the customer name field in the sales order?

entry.title: using Number Range Object to get unique number in "Manage Sales Order" App of S4hana cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to get unique number (auto increase number) custom field in Manage Sales Order App of S4hana cloud.

And I found "Manage Number Range Intervals" App.

But there is no Create or Add button in App.

1. Can it be possible to use Number Range Object to set new custom field of unique number (auto increase number) in Manage Sales Order app of S4hana cloud?

2. If No.1 is yes, Is there any possible way to create Number Range Object using this "Manage Number Range Intervals" or need to use other App?

3. Is there any way to call "Number Range Object created using ADT" from BAdI custom logic?

If you have any experience about this or any document about how to create Number Range Object in S4hana cloud, could you please share with me?

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Trigger logic in MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM BAdI
entry.content:
I would like to create auto increase number custom field in Manage Purchase Order app.

My current development steps are as following

1. I added a custom field to Purchase Order item screen using In-App Extensibility.

2. I created new custom BO to save current increase number.

3. Write logic in Modify Purchase Order Item (MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM ) BAdI.

The problem here is the number is always increasing everytime I enter to Manage Purchase Order screen without saving or with saving. 

And, the number keeps increasing even when I only enter to Purchase Order screen just for looking information.

So, I would like to ask that

 in Manage Purchase Order app, is there any BAdI that will be trigger only when Save button is clicked (like Before Save event) and also custom field can be used ?

(Or)

 Is there any condition that can be added in Modify Purchase Order Item (MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM ) BAdI to trigger only when Save button is clicked?

entry.title: Creating custom field (auto increase number) in Header of Manage Sales Order App S4Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to add a custom field in Header level of Sales Order.

The custom field must have prefix value and must be increase 1 whenever new Sales Order is created.

(eg. SO-00000001, SO-000000002,.....)

To get this kind of custom field,

could you please provide any workaround, idea or documentation? 

 

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Connect SAP BTP to S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,
I want to Deploy my Fiori app to Sap S4hana Public Cloud, I stuck in problem when try to create a Fiori app on SAP BAS
I am Follow this tutorials on SAP Developers, 

 Create a SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials

I have done Step 2 and Step 3 

Communication system on SAP S4hana Cloud Side

 

Destination on SAP BTP Side 

Connection is fine 

My Problem:

I Think that there are any change in SAMLAssertion Authentication ? Because I have done this tutorial 5 months ago but now I'm facing the problem with same settings. The Error tell me that maybe my destination not works ? there are any setting that I'm missing

I'm waiting for yours solutions, 
Thanks

entry.title: Integrating SAP S/4HANA Cloud with Google Workspace
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

 

We have a requirement to integrate with Google Workspace. 

1. Let us know the whole process.

2. How do we access Google Console.

3. Need help with achieving this integration.

 

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Can we develop custom Adobe Forms from Scratch and Deploy the same to S4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently we are implementing S4HANA Public Cloud Version 2402 for a client and the requirement is to develop Custom Adobe Form from scratch for Service Entry Sheets. Could you please let me know if we can do this in Public Cloud and if yes how can we execute this? How to develop the user interface to trigger the developed form?

Note: This post is not about extending any existing Form Templates provide by SAP.

entry.title: S4CLOUD : Adobe Form - Purchase Order Item Text not DISPLAYED
entry.content:
Experts, 

We are using S4 HANA CLoud environment 2402 - There is already a custom form configured for Purchase order , i am not able to see the PO item text within form output even though its binded with value : $.PurchaseOrderHeaderTextElement.

How should i debug and analyse ? 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility SAP Interactive Forms by Adobe SAP Forms service by Adobe

entry.title: SAP S/4 Hana Cloud: Testing Form Development
entry.content:
Team,

I am trying to download the .XML file that includes the sample data from Purchase Order using syntax -'#&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&#'. but getting below error and upon continuing this error and bypassing using continue nothing happenned.

 

Followed the below thread - 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-s-4-hana-cloud-testing-form-developments-in-adobe-livecycle-designer/ba-p/13416953

entry.title: Creating Custom BO with upload function like 'Import Supplier Invoices' App in S4hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to create a custom business object with upload function like Import Supplier Invoices App in S4Hana Cloud system.

Is it possible to create that kind of custom business object using Key User (In App) Extensibility or Developer (On Stack) Extensibility using ADT?

Or any workaround exist?

Could you please provide any idea?

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Set Initialize Value for Purchase Order in S4HANA
entry.content:
I would like to initialize values for custom fields in this BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PO_INITIALIZE.

But I can't call the custom fields in this BAdI. Is there any ways to call custom fields in this BAdI?

entry.title: Import Sales Order Extension
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I have a specific requirement for the Import Sales Order Fiori application.
where in, I have below 3 requirements. 

1. Extend the VBAP and VBAK data with custom fields - (Its already achieved and working through CFL so I am good here. )

2. I also need some custom fields to be appended in the VBKD field from the CFL - But this is not possible only through CFL as the business contexts etc is not available for VBKD..... 
Ques - How can this be achieved. 

2.1 Also, there are some standard fields of VBKD which is required for filling up the data through the download template but those fields are not available in the underlying main CDS view, so not able to use them as well. 
Ques - What is the best approach here?

4. I have a custom table which also needs to be amended with some data from the download template of fiori screen. 

Ques - Is it possible? What is the best approach here? 

On-Prem system

entry.title: Is PO Item Text output within form can be controlled at Purchase organization level ?
entry.content: In S4 HANA Public cloud , Is there is a functionality where we can restrict printing a Purchase order item text in the form layout with respect to Purchase Organization ?

entry.title: Custom CDS View with several dependencies deprecated
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

The Primary Datasource of a CDS view is deprecated and we are having several CDS views that are dependent on this view that also have CDS views that are dependent on this. There is no way to just replace the primary data source without causing issues for the other CDS views?

 

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Using Database Tables created using RAP in Custom Fields
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created a Report Using RAP in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud, we want to use the key field  from this report as a Value Help(F4) into a custom field on sales order screen. The Database table when view in "View Browser" is released for both "Key User" and "Cloud Development"

 

 

but when we go to create a "Custom Field Based on CDS" the respective view is not displayed. Even if we try creating a Custom CDS View this view is not available.

Thanks and Regards,

Ashish Talekar

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility @Expert
